message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Virologist wear gloves

participant "attackerVirologist:Virologist" as attackerVirologist
participant "v: Virologist" as v
participant "glovesOnVirologist:Gloves" as glovesOnVirologist

activate attackerVirologist
activate v
attack(forgetAgent:Agent, attackerVirologist:Virologist) --> v
activate glovesOnVirologist
defense(forgetAgent:Agent,v:Virologist, attackerVirologist:Virologist) --> glovesOnVirologist
attack(forgetAgent:Agent, attackerVirologist:Virologist,v:Virologist) <[o]-- glovesOnVirologist
deactivate attackerVirologist
glovesOnVirologist -> glovesOnVirologit : decreaseTTL()
activate glovesOnVirologit
glovesOnVirologit --[dotted]> glovesOnVirologit
opt [life==0]
    glovesOnVirologit -> glovesOnVirologit : discard(v:Virologist)
    activate glovesOnVirologit
    glovesOnVirologit --[dotted]> glovesOnVirologit
end opt
deactivate glovesOnVirologit
glovesOnVirologit --[dotted]> v
deactivate glovesOnVirologit
deactivate v
@enduml
```
